name: OpenClaw Accessibility
description: Registers the a11y_audit tool: runs axe-core against a page or raw HTML over the existing Chromium (via CDP) and returns structured WCAG findings { ok, standard, target, summary, violations }, failing open to { ok:false, error } so a bad audit can never break the agent turn. Ships two skills (accessibility, a11y-auditor) that drive the tool.

cdpEndpoint.description: CDP endpoint of the Chromium to connect to. Overridden at deploy time per host.

defaultStandard.description: axe standard used when a call omits `standard`.

timeoutMs.description: Max time for one audit before failing open with `timeout`.
